description: Add real-time data simulation and professional visual enhancements to the Dashboard, Scanner, and core widgets. Make the app feel alive with Timer-based data updates, animated transitions, glassmorphism cards, gradient backgrounds, glowing active elements, and pulsing indicators.
steps: 1. DASHBOARD REAL-TIME (qml/pages/dashboard/DashboardPage.qml): Add a Timer with 2000ms interval that randomizes dashboardViewModel properties within realistic ranges (securityScore 82-95, threatsBlocked incrementing by 1-5, activeScans 1-5, openIncidents 3-12, cpuUsage 30-80, memUsage 55-85, diskUsage 40-70). Add Behavior animations on all numeric properties so value changes animate smoothly. Update the 'Last updated' timestamp text with a Timer that refreshes every second.

2. DASHBOARD LIVE CHART (qml/pages/dashboard/DashboardPage.qml): Add a Timer (3000ms) that shifts chartData array left and appends a new random value (20-80), causing the ThreatChart to re-render with animated data. The chart should show 'rolling' live data.

3. DASHBOARD VISUAL UPGRADE (qml/pages/dashboard/DashboardPage.qml): Replace the plain Rectangle background of the security score, compliance, endpoint health, and system performance cards with glassmorphism style: semi-transparent background (opacity 0.7), subtle gradient overlay using a child Rectangle with gradient, and a subtle border glow (border.color with rgba of primaryColor at 0.3). Add a subtle pulsing animation (SequentialAnimation on opacity) to the network status indicator dot and critical alerts badge.

4. STAT CARD ENHANCEMENT (qml/widgets/StatCard.qml): Add Behavior on the value text opacity for smooth number transitions. Add a subtle gradient background to the card (from surfaceColor to slightly lighter variant). Add a left-side colored accent strip (4px wide) matching iconColor. Make the sparkline redraw when data changes by connecting to a timer.

5. THREAT CHART ANIMATION (qml/widgets/ThreatChart.qml): Add smooth transitions when chartData changes - use a property animation that interpolates between old and new values. Add a subtle glow effect to the line by drawing it twice (once with larger lineWidth and lower opacity as glow).

6. SECURITY SCORE GAUGE ENHANCEMENT (qml/widgets/SecurityScoreGauge.qml): Add a pulsing glow effect around the arc endpoint. Add a gradient-like effect on the score arc by drawing multiple concentric arcs with decreasing opacity. Add a rotating shimmer animation on the background track.

7. SCANNER REAL-TIME (qml/pages/scanner/ScannerPage.qml): When user clicks 'Start Scan', set scannerViewModel.scanning=true and start a Timer that increments progress by 0.005-0.02 every 200ms, increments filesScanned by 50-200, occasionally adds threats (1% chance per tick), updates elapsed time string, and updates currentFile with cycling realistic file paths. When progress reaches 1.0, stop the timer and mark scan complete. Add visual feedback: pulsing glow on the ProgressRing during scan, animated file path text that fades in/out.

8. PROGRESS RING ENHANCEMENT (qml/widgets/ProgressRing.qml): Add a glowing halo effect behind the progress arc (draw arc with larger lineWidth and lower opacity). Add a particle-like dot that travels along the arc ahead of the progress point. Ensure the ring animates smoothly during real-time scan updates.

9. THEME MANAGER ENHANCEMENTS (qml/themes/ThemeManager.qml): Add new color tokens for glassmorphism: glassBackground (rgba white 0.05 dark / rgba white 0.7 light), glassBorder (rgba white 0.1 dark / rgba black 0.1 light), glowColor (primaryColor with 0.4 alpha). Add gradientStart and gradientEnd colors for card backgrounds. Add accentGlow color property.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard data values change automatically every 2-3 seconds without user interaction
Threat chart shows rolling live data with new points appearing
Security score gauge arc animates smoothly when score value changes
Scanner 'Start Scan' button triggers a realistic scan simulation with progress advancing
StatCards have gradient backgrounds and accent strips
Pulsing indicators visible on network status dot and critical alerts
All number transitions use Behavior animations for smooth changes
ThemeManager has new glass/glow color tokens
Non-Qt Linux build (cmake -B build -DENABLE_QT=OFF && cmake --build build) still succeeds
